message:
feat(node): harden eviction saga transitions, expand release verification CLI, and refine engine dispatcher

Eviction saga (eviction_saga.rs):
- Add ensure_transition_allowed() guard that validates state machine
  transitions before any mutation occurs, preventing partial state
  corruption on illegal transitions
- Reorder verify_complete() to check L3 presence before attempting
  remote cap recheck, producing clearer error messages
- Move can_retire_l2() check from verify_complete() into
  retire_complete() where it semantically belongs (retirement gate,
  not verification gate)
- Add 4 new tests covering: illegal transition non-mutation on
  upload_complete, verify_complete, retire_complete, and L3-missing
  verify path

Release verification CLI (main.rs, +344 lines):
- Introduce ReleaseVerificationContext struct for organized manifest,
  artifact, signature, and key ring management
- Add decode_signature_blob() supporting hex and base64 encoded
  ed25519 signatures with automatic format detection
- Add parse_verifying_key_from_blob() for flexible public key parsing
  (raw 32-byte, hex, base64)
- Expand handle_verify_release with full SHA256SUMS manifest parsing,
  per-artifact integrity verification, detached signature validation,
  unlisted artifact detection, and structured JSON/human output

Control plane (root_pointer.rs): minor refinements
Engine dispatcher (engine_dispatcher.rs): dispatcher adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
